title: The Boy Who Was Called Pig's Foot
overview: Makabe Masamune was a chubby little kid but after years of training, he manages to lose weight and becomes a hot guy. This was all so he could get revenge on a girl who called him Pig's Foot as a child by making her fall in love with him and dumping her in return.

title: Cinderella Doesn't Smile
overview: Masamune recieves a letter with the words "Pig's Foot" written on it and realizes someone knows about his past. Masamune tries to find the person who sent the letter, and it ends up being someone rather surprising.

title: Yoshino's Magic Show
overview: In order to try to get Aki to promise to go on a date with him, Masamune teams up with Kojuurou and challenges Aki and Yoshino to see who can get a better score on a test. If he wins, he gets a date with Aki. If he loses, he'll have to live with the nickname Aki gave him until he graduates. How will this end up?

title: Clear and Present Danger
overview: Masamune is planning his strategy to get revenge on Aki by reading the shojo manga, "Barasute," but Yoshino, aka Master, tells him he's doing it wrong. Rather than the aggressive approach he's been using, Masamune tries to get Aki to pay more attention to him by ignoring her, but...

title: Mysterious Cat
overview: Masamune saves Aki as she was about to be hit by a car, when the mysterious beautiful girl who was riding in the car comes out and says that she was waiting to see Masamune and hugs him. A few days later, a girl named Fujinomiya Neko transfers into Masamune's class, and Aki's mood has been worse ever since...

title: Attack! Battle of the Home Visits
overview: Neko tries desperately to try to win Masamune's affection. However, Masamune seems rather oblivious to this fact and when he gets home, he finds Yoshino and Neko there, making him food. Masamune panics because there are various things from his past that he doesn't want to be seen...

title: The Tsunade Island Incident
overview: After finishing their exams, summer vacation finally begins. Masamune plans his next move to get closer to Aki, and heads to Tsunade Island along with the others to spend time at Aki’s summer villa. Yoshino tells Masamune that if he’s not able to make any progress with Aki there, she would tell Aki everything that’s been going on. Once they get to the island, they meet the secretary of the Adagaki family, Yuigasaki, and Masamune tells her that he’s dating Aki. This leads to the two having to pretend that they are a couple...

title: It's Not You
overview: Masamune suddenly gets a call from Aki on his cellphone. Masamune then realizes that the picture of him and Aki when they were children that was in his room is gone, and he’s certain that Neko is the one who took it. Masamune sneaks into Neko’s room to try to find out the truth, but is found by Neko. And then, Neko does something rather surprising...

title: It's Been Called Love and Affection
overview: After being rejected by Masamune, Neko disappears, and they all go to search for her. Aki seems to feel sorry for Neko since she was rejected, and then Masamune asks her if she remembers the nickname “Pig’s Foot.” When they finally find Neko, she starts talking about the past...

title: The New School Term Filled With Doubts
overview: Another Masamune appears in front of Aki named Gasou Kanetsugu. Summer break ends and Masamune continues his approach on Aki but he learns that he is Aki’s betrothed. Masamune sees that Aki’s attitude toward Kanetsugu is completely different from how she treats him, so he panics and goes to Yoshino to figure out what to do, but...

title: Snow White of the Yasaka Festival
overview: Whoever gets more votes for their production of “Snow White” for the cultural fair, get to dance with Aki afterwards. The battle has begun between Masamune and Kanetsugu. Suddenly, something rather unexpected happens to the both of them...

title: Don't Let Go of the Mic, Even if You Die
overview: Despite all the trouble, the cultural festival is now over. They all end up having an after party at karaoke and battle it out there. What will become of Masamune’s revenge?!

title: The Wee Parisian Mademoiselle
overview: Masamune and Aki's class goes to France for their school trip and there, they meet an aspiring manga artist named Muriel.

title: The Princess's Confession
overview: Aki tells Masamune about her past, but Masamune realizes that somehow, they remember a pivotal moment in their lives very differently.

title: They Show Up When You Least Expect It
overview: Gasou tries to get closer to Aki, and Masamune confronts Yoshino about something.

title: I'm Not Going to Fall in Love with You, Pig's Foot
overview: Yoshino tells Masamune exactly what happened in their past and then convinces him to stop Gasou from getting too close to Aki.

title: So We Became a Couple
overview: Masamune interrupts Aki and Kanetsugu's date by saying he's the Masamune Aki had met 8 years ago and ends up asking her out. Surprisingly, Aki ends up saying yes and the two formally become a couple, but Masamune can't help but feel conflicted…

title: Our Second Date
overview: Masamune and Aki go on their second date on Christmas Eve, which happens to be Aki's birthday as well, but...

title: There's No Point in This Confession
overview: After ruining his Christmas Eve date with Aki, Masamune tries to get some answers as to why he keeps breaking out in hives around Aki.

title: There Are Things You Shouldn't Realize
overview: Masamune helps Yoshino after she sprains her ankle, and Aki meets with Gasou.

title: Saint Valentine Is Watching
overview: Valentine's day is on the horizon and Yoshino offers to help Aki with making something for Masamune. Afterward Aki and Masamune go out on a date.

title: Whiteout
overview: Aki invites Masamune out on a White Day date but it ends up going in a very unexpected direction.

title: Face Your Feelings
overview: Masamune has had a series of absences from school, so Yoshino decides to check in on him after school. Chinatsu reveals that he's left and is staying with their grandfather in Shinsu.

title: Dead or Love?
overview: What is the ultimate fate that awaits Masamune, Aki, and Yoshino?
